positive: A stylized, symmetrical celestial whale swimming through a nebula-filled ocean. The whale is rendered in clean silhouette with phosphorescent bioluminescent patterns detailing its fins and tail. The ocean water is deep indigo and teal, dotted with glowing cosmic particulate matter and stylized constellations. Above the water, a crescent moon and distant, vibrant star clusters create a mystical, cosmic backdrop. Minimalist, high contrast, graphic design style, ink wash texture with neon glow highlights, perfect for apparel printing, clean lines, symmetrical composition, cinematic lighting.
negative: blur, artifact, text, watermark, logo, signature, noise, ugly, cropped, poorly drawn, extra limbs, bad anatomy, low detail, photorealistic, grainy
